items_flat.title_en: xAI Iterates Grok Build with Voice, Commands & Grok 4.5 Default
items_flat.title_zh: xAI 迭代 Grok Build：新增語音、指令與 Grok 4.5 預設
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk and community posts highlighted ongoing daily improvements to Grok Build, including Ctrl+Space speech-to-text, /timeline sidebar toggle, /summarize command, Grok 4.5 as default model with reasoning effort levels, and various bug fixes and usability enhancements.
items_flat.summary_zh: Elon Musk 與社群貼文強調 Grok Build 每日持續改進，包括 Ctrl+Space 語音轉文字、/timeline 側邊欄切換、/summarize 指令、Grok 4.5 成為預設模型（含高/中/低推理努力等級）以及多項錯誤修正與可用性提升。
items_flat.analysis_en: xAI's daily iteration pace on developer tools like Grok Build underscores a focus on practical, user-driven enhancements over big-bang releases. This approach builds momentum in the coding agent space but leaves open how it scales against more established competitors' ecosystems.
items_flat.analysis_zh: xAI 在 Grok Build 等開發者工具上的每日迭代速度，突顯注重實用、使用者導向的改進而非大爆炸式發布。此策略有助於在程式碼代理領域累積動能，但仍需觀察如何與更成熟競爭對手的生態系統抗衡。
items_flat.quote: Grok Build improves almost every day
items_flat.quote_zh: Grok Build 幾乎每天都在改進

xai.title_en: xAI Iterates Grok Build with Voice, Commands & Grok 4.5 Default
xai.title_zh: xAI 迭代 Grok Build：新增語音、指令與 Grok 4.5 預設
xai.summary_en: Elon Musk and community posts highlighted ongoing daily improvements to Grok Build, including Ctrl+Space speech-to-text, /timeline sidebar toggle, /summarize command, Grok 4.5 as default model with reasoning effort levels, and various bug fixes and usability enhancements.

xai.analysis_en: xAI's daily iteration pace on developer tools like Grok Build underscores a focus on practical, user-driven enhancements over big-bang releases. This approach builds momentum in the coding agent space but leaves open how it scales against more established competitors' ecosystems.

xai.quote: Grok Build improves almost every day
xai.quote_zh: Grok Build 幾乎每天都在改進

brief_en: xAI continues rapid Grok Build iterations with voice input, new commands, and Grok 4.5 as default. No major model releases or announcements from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, or others in the last 12 hours.
brief_zh: xAI 持續快速迭代 Grok Build，新增語音輸入、新指令，並以 Grok 4.5 為預設。過去 12 小時內 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、Meta 等無重大模型發布或公告。
